title: Brighten global text font color

requirements.text: Increase the perceived brightness of text across the app by adjusting the global theme color tokens used for typography (at minimum: --foreground, --card-foreground, --popover-foreground, and --muted-foreground) in the active Tailwind base stylesheet (frontend/src/index.css). Ensure the change improves readability on top of the background image overlays and glass cards without breaking light/dark theme behavior.

quotes: make the text font color bright

acceptanceCriteria: In both light and dark themes, default text (text-foreground) renders with a visibly brighter appearance than before.
Secondary/help text (text-muted-foreground), such as the descriptive paragraphs on the login screen, is brighter and easier to read against the background overlays.
No text becomes unreadable due to insufficient contrast (e.g., light text on light backgrounds) in common screens: login, calendar, daily view, and settings.

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/components/ui (read-only UI component sources).
Do not edit immutable hook/bootstrapping files (e.g., frontend/src/main.tsx, frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts(x), frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts).
nonGoals: Changing font family, font size, or typography layout.
Adding new theme modes beyond the existing light/dark preference.
